# unknown-key-warn

Unhandled ConfigMap keys emit warn diagnostics and are dropped

!!! tip "Direction: `from`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `from` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/regressions/unknown-key-warn` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  url: https://argocd.example.com
  totally.unknown.setting: "xyz"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    urls:
    - https://argocd.example.com
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cm->cr
  key: totally.unknown.setting
  message: unhandled key in argocd-cm; value will be dropped on conversion
  severity: warn
```
